en: By the Nile, they got the money on a bet Called crocodiles
ko: 나일 강에서 그들은 내기에 돈을 걸었어

en: They snapped their teeth on your cigarette Foreign types of the hookah, I'd say
The blonde witches take their trays Spin around and they cross the floor
They've got the moves You drop your drink, then they bring you more
All the school kids so sick of books They like the punk and the metal band When the buzzer rings
They're walking like an Egyptian All the kids in the marketplace say
